task: Get a part-time job within 5 miles of Moscow, Idaho in the accommodation and food services industry, as a chef, and show jobs for corporate only.
graderReasoning: The agent ultimately reached the OhioMeansJobs search results page with the requested filters applied and visible in the filter panel: Location Moscow, ID within 5 miles, Job Type Part-time, Occupation Chefs and Head Cooks, Industry Accommodation and Food Services, and Show Corporate Sites Only. The final loaded URL also contains the corresponding parameters (`sid=29`, `rad=5`, `jt=5`, `omjindustry=72`, `occ=35101100`, `cjfcso=1`). The results page explicitly shows `0 jobs found` and the message `Sorry, no results found. Please try broadening your search.` Since showing that no matching jobs exist is a valid completion, this is success.
final_result_response:
Done. The OhioMeansJobs search is filtered to:

- Chef keyword
- Moscow, ID within 5 miles
- Part-time
- Accommodation and Food Services
- Occupation: Chefs and Head Cooks
- Corporate sites only

Result: 0 jobs found. The page says: “Sorry, no results found. Please try broadening your search.”
action_history: Opening OhioMeansJobs: const p1 = await openTab('https://ohiomeansjobs.ohio.gov/');
Searching for chef jobs: await page.locator('e19').fill('chef');
Searching for chef jobs: await page.locator('e20').click();
Opening advanced search filters: await page.locator('e19').click();
Opening result filters: await page.locator('e121').click();
Opening result filters: await page.locator('e18').click();
Setting location and radius: await page.locator('e138').click();
Setting location and radius: await page.locator('e23').fill('Moscow');
Setting location and radius: await page.locator('e26').click();
Inspecting available filters for current search: await page.locator('e18').click();
Expanding all filters: await page.locator('e101').click();
Applying industry filter: await page.locator('e119').click();
Applying part-time and corporate filters: await page.locator('e148').click();
Applying part-time and corporate filters: await page.locator('e114').click();
Applying accommodation industry filter: await page.locator('e185').click();
Displaying filtered results: await page.locator('e116').click();
Reopening filters to locate industry and occupation: await page.locator('e18').click();
Applying accommodation industry from reopened filters: await page.locator('e92').click();
Displaying final filtered results: await page.locator('e133').click();
Confirming final URL and filters: await page.locator('e18').click();
Confirming active filters: await page.locator('e18').click();
